results.name: Confluence
results.description_excerpt: Team wiki and knowledge base by Atlassian. Pages, spaces, templates, macros. Comprehensive REST API and Connect framework. Standard in Japanese enterprise documentation.

results.name: BigCommerce
results.description_excerpt: Enterprise ecommerce platform. Headless commerce, multi-channel selling, B2B support. REST and GraphQL APIs. Strong API-first architecture for composable commerce.

results.name: Dropbox Business
results.description_excerpt: Cloud storage and team collaboration. Dropbox Business API for file operations, team management, and sharing. Popular with design and creative teams in Japan.

results.name: mcp-for-beginners
results.description_excerpt: This open-source curriculum introduces the fundamentals of Model Context Protocol (MCP) through real-world, cross-language examples in .NET, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust and

results.name: ActiveCampaign
results.description_excerpt: Marketing automation and CRM platform. Email marketing, sales automation, messaging, machine learning-powered predictions. REST API v3 for contacts, deals, automations.

results.name: Pixelle (Community)
results.description_excerpt: An Open-Source Multimodal AIGC Solution based on ComfyUI + MCP + LLM  https://pixelle.ai

results.name: Amazon Japan (SP-API)
results.description_excerpt: Amazon Selling Partner API for Japanese marketplace. Product listing, orders, fulfillment, reports. Third-party MCP servers exist.

results.name: Box Japan
results.description_excerpt: Enterprise cloud content management and file sharing. No.1 enterprise file storage in Japan. Full REST API with OAuth 2.0. Supports metadata, workflows, and AI-powered content insi

results.name: PostgreSQL MCP
results.description_excerpt: World's most advanced open-source relational database. Official MCP server by Anthropic for read-only queries. AI agents can inspect schemas and query data directly.

results.name: LeanKG (Community)
results.description_excerpt: LeanKG: Stop Burning Tokens. Start Coding Lean.

results.name: Python MCP SDK
results.description_excerpt: The official Python SDK for Model Context Protocol servers and clients

results.name: finData (Community)
results.description_excerpt: FinData enables  your AI agents retrieve financial data from different providers like Tushare, Wind, and DataYes.

results.name: Playwright-AI-Agent-POM-MCP-Server
results.description_excerpt: Playwright AI Agent POM MCP ServerPlaywright AI Agent using Page Object Model (POM) architecture with MCP Server integration for automated web and mobile  testing

results.name: CircleCI
results.description_excerpt: Continuous integration and delivery (CI/CD) platform. Pipeline orchestration, Docker-based builds, parallelism, test splitting. REST API v2 for pipeline management and insights.

results.name: Help Scout
results.description_excerpt: Customer support platform with shared inbox, knowledge base, and live chat. REST API (Mailbox 2.0) for conversations, customers, and reports.

results.name: Trace (Community)
results.description_excerpt: MCP server for Claude Code and Codex. One tool call replaces ~42 minutes of agent exploration

results.name: mcp-graph-workflow
results.description_excerpt: MCP local-first CLI tool that converts PRD text files into persistent execution graphs (SQLite) for structured agentic workflows

results.name: EC-CUBE
results.description_excerpt: Open-source EC platform dominant in Japan. Self-hosted or cloud. Plugin ecosystem. REST API for products, orders, customers. Powers many Japanese online shops.

results.name: LINE Messaging MCP
results.description_excerpt: LINE official bot messaging. Push/broadcast messages, flex messages, user profiles. Official MCP server by LINE (preview status).

results.name: Heroku
results.description_excerpt: Platform-as-a-service for building, running, and scaling apps. Git-based deploys, add-on marketplace, Heroku Postgres. Platform API for app and dyno management.

results.name: X (Twitter) API
results.description_excerpt: Social media platform API. Post tweets, read timelines, manage lists, search. API v2 with OAuth 2.0. Essential for social monitoring and engagement automation.

results.name: Garoon MCP
results.description_excerpt: Enterprise groupware by Cybozu. Schedule management and messaging. Official MCP server. Can combine with kintone MCP for full Cybozu suite.

results.name: Klaviyo
results.description_excerpt: Email and SMS marketing automation for ecommerce. Flows, campaigns, segmentation, predictive analytics. REST API v3 for lists, profiles, campaigns, and event tracking.

results.name: GitLab
results.description_excerpt: DevSecOps platform with built-in CI/CD, container registry, and security scanning. Official MCP server available for Duo integration.

results.name: inspector
results.description_excerpt: Development platform to debug, chat, inspect, and evaluate MCP servers, MCP apps, and ChatGPT apps.

results.name: ClickUp
results.description_excerpt: All-in-one project management and productivity platform. Tasks, docs, goals, whiteboards, time tracking. Comprehensive REST API. Growing adoption in Japanese startups and dev teams

results.name: mcp-adr-analysis-server
results.description_excerpt: A sophisticated Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for analyzing Architectural Decision Records (ADRs) and providing deep architectural insights to AI agents.

results.name: Chatwork MCP
results.description_excerpt: Business messaging platform dominant in Japanese companies. Send messages, manage rooms, share files, create tasks within chats. Official MCP server with npm package.

results.name: b→dash
results.description_excerpt: All-in-one customer data platform (CDP). MA, BI, web analytics in one. Data palette (no-code data integration). Growing rapidly in Japanese mid-market. 顧客データ基盤。

results.name: Otter.ai
results.description_excerpt: AI meeting transcription and note-taking. Real-time transcription, automated summaries, and action items from meetings. Integrates with Zoom, Teams, Google Meet.

results.name: Make (Integromat)
results.description_excerpt: Visual automation platform connecting 1,800+ apps. Build complex workflows with branching, error handling, and data transformation. Formerly Integromat.

results.name: Buffer
results.description_excerpt: SNS投稿管理プラットフォーム。Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok への投稿スケジュール管理。REST API for publishing, analytics, and channel management.

results.name: Turso
results.description_excerpt: Edge-hosted distributed SQLite database built on libSQL. Low-latency reads from 30+ regions. REST API and native SDKs. Embedded replicas for local-first apps.

results.name: Cloudinary
results.description_excerpt: Media management platform for images and videos. Upload, transform, optimize, and deliver media via CDN. REST API and SDKs for programmable media pipelines.

results.name: Sentry
results.description_excerpt: Application error monitoring and performance tracking. REST API for issue management, release tracking, and alert configuration. Used by Japanese dev teams.

results.name: Bifrost (Community)
results.description_excerpt: Fastest enterprise AI gateway (50x faster than LiteLLM) with adaptive load balancer, cluster mode, guardrails, 1000+ models support & <100 µs overhead at 5k RPS.

results.name: formrun
results.description_excerpt: Form builder + customer management SaaS. Slack/Spreadsheet integration. Create forms, manage submissions, track customer inquiries.

results.name: Money Forward Cloud MCP
results.description_excerpt: Cloud accounting with AI-powered categorization. Journal entry, ledger search, trial balance, report creation. Remote MCP available to all plans since March 2026.

results.name: Google Meet
results.description_excerpt: Google's video conferencing platform integrated with Google Workspace. Meeting creation, calendar integration, recording management via Google Calendar and Admin APIs.

results.name: Mistral AI
results.description_excerpt: European AI lab. Mistral, Mixtral, and Codestral models. Function calling, JSON mode, vision. REST API compatible with OpenAI format. Strong open-weight model lineup.
